title: Chiikawa Resourcepack
description: This is an add-on resource pack for the Japanese anime "Chiikawa"
body:
![totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a641e6d24006f0775088f5888bbdc6c831180725.png)
This is an add-on resource pack for the Japanese anime "Chiikawa"

Changes include:
- Totem of Undying for Chiikawa Model
- 4 different models on the netherite sword, diamnond sword, iron sword, wooden sword
- Leather armor changed to pyjamas

![sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4860146d0317cc12bdc21cda7dc16d06cc3ec485.png) 
![set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0525fa5a25a504c1e3be7d400dc53e9eab02d3bf.jpeg)
![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d250f785fb69f3c5d2fbcb9e7ce97b0e64ab4fc.jpeg)
